# FirstTouch — AI Personal Brand Manager

> AI-powered content creation, scheduling, and publishing for busy professionals. Done-for-you personal brand management across LinkedIn, X, and Instagram.

## What is FirstTouch?

FirstTouch is an AI personal brand manager that autonomously creates, schedules, and publishes social media content in your voice. It handles the full content lifecycle: industry research, post generation, platform-optimized formatting, and auto-publishing at optimal times. You approve everything via Telegram in under 5 minutes per day.

## Core Capabilities

- **AI Content Generation** — Claude AI writes posts in your voice using your expertise pillars and real-time industry research
- **Telegram Interface** — approve, edit, or skip posts with one tap; voice message feedback supported
- **Multi-Platform Publishing** — LinkedIn, X (Twitter), Instagram with platform-native formatting
- **Smart Content Calendar** — 2-week rolling schedule with automatic gap detection and pillar balancing
- **Voice & Style Learning** — AI builds a voice model from your existing content and learns from every edit
- **Carousel & Visual Content** — AI-generated carousel images with your brand colors
- **Reply & Comment Engine** — draft thoughtful replies to posts in your feed
- **Enterprise Team Mode** — manage personal brands for entire leadership teams from one dashboard

## Who It's For

- **Startup Founders** — need visibility but no marketing team
- **Corporate Managers** — want thought leadership without the time investment
- **Enterprise Teams** — consistent personal branding across 5-50 team members

## Pricing

- **Starter** (€299/month) — 3 posts/week on LinkedIn, AI voice calibration, Telegram interface
- **Professional** (€499/month) — LinkedIn + X, reply management, real-time research, video scripts
- **Enterprise** (Custom) — 5-50 profiles, LinkedIn + X + Instagram, coordinated themes, admin dashboard

## Architecture

- AI: Claude Sonnet (content generation), Gemini Flash (web search, voice transcription), Gemini Imagen (carousel images)
- Database: Supabase (PostgreSQL, EU-hosted)
- Interface: Telegram Bot API (primary), React web dashboard (secondary)
- Publishing: LinkedIn API v2, X API v2, Instagram Graph API
- Content pipeline: YouTube/web research → RAG scoring → AI generation → Telegram approval → auto-publish
